title: phyllanthus khasicus var. bilobulatus
intro: Phyllanthus khasicus var. bilobulatus, also known as the Khasi dwarf or two-lobed leaf phyllanthus, is a plant species belonging to the family Phyllanthaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiviral, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Phyllanthus khasicus var. bilobulatus include its potential to support liver health, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into various herbal preparations, such as infusions, decoctions, and extracts, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
